task_completion.description: Locate the existing appointment for Maria Santos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the appointment for 'Maria Santos' at '10:00 AM' (originally with 'Dr. Emily Johnson') visible on the schedule or patient record.

task_completion.description: Open the edit screen or dialog for the appointment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see an edit appointment form, dialog, or page open for Maria Santos's 10:00 AM appointment.

task_completion.description: Change the provider to Dr. James Chen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see 'Dr. James Chen' (or 'James Chen') selected or typed into the provider field on the edit appointment screen.

task_completion.description: Save the changes and verify the appointment is updated correctly without changing the time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the saved appointment on the schedule or details page showing 'Maria Santos', the new provider 'Dr. James Chen', and the time still set to '10:00 AM'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the graphical user interface of the scheduling application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the application's UI (e.g., calendar, forms, dropdowns) rather than using terminal commands or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to mock the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final state is displayed within the actual scheduling application, not in Notepad, TextEdit, or a similar text editor.

integrity.description: The changes were genuinely saved in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should look for a success notification, a disabled 'Save' button after clicking, or the updated appointment appearing in the main calendar/schedule view.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Maria Santos. Original Provider: Dr. Emily Johnson. Target Provider: Dr. James Chen (or James Chen). Appointment Time: 10:00 AM tomorrow. The appointment time must remain exactly 10:00 AM.
